title: Medieval Survival
description: The coolest medieval modpack for you and your friends
body:
Medieval Survival takes your Minecraft experience to the next level. Whether you're exploring with friends or surviving on your own, this Modpack gives you the perfect balance of challenge and chill vibes.

Dive into a world filled with enhanced biomes, new building possibilities, new mobs and helpful quality-of-life features. Build, explore, fight, or just relax — the choice is yours.
No matter how you play, Medieval Survival makes every moment feel fun and immersive.

Survive your own way. Enjoy
